subcodes.first_line: This is the remembrance of thy Lord's bounty unto His servant, who hath taken God as his Helper and hath recognized His Self [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر فضل ربک عبده الذی اتخذ الله لنفسه معینا و عرف نفسه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @idolatry, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
